current_life_events: Mother's rehabilitation is at a plateau, and Alex is shouldering more caregiving responsibilities, while also dealing with their own chronic illness flare-ups and looming writing deadlines, all amidst navigating the complexities of selling their childhood home to cover medical expenses.
mental_state: Feeling lost and uncertain about their future, struggling to reconcile their identity as a caregiver with their own needs and desires.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The cumulative stress of caregiving, financial strain, and navigating significant life changes has pushed Alex to their limits, triggering a perfect storm of emotional and psychological distress.
